What We Supply

Our Product Categories

Request Full Catalog →
Available Now

Medical Devices & Orthopedic Supports

A complete range of orthopedic braces and supports — knee, ankle, back, shoulder, wrist, walking boots, and post-op footwear. All FDA-registered and CE marked.

MOQ: From 10 pcs / item
Available Now

Medical Consumables

Surgical masks, examination gloves, wound care dressings, and infection control supplies. CE and ISO 13485 certified. Bulk and custom packaging available.

MOQ: From 1,000 pcs / item
Available Now

Home Healthcare Devices

TENS/EMS therapy units, digital thermometers, blood pressure monitors, and rehabilitation aids. NMPA, CE, and FDA registered for global markets.

MOQ: From 50 pcs / item
Available Now

OEM & Private Label Manufacturing

Custom product development and private label manufacturing. From design and regulatory compliance through to final delivery under your brand name.

MOQ: Discuss requirements

Pharmaceutical Export

Sourcing and export of registered pharmaceutical products for international markets. Contact us to register your interest and discuss specific requirements.

Why MedLink Global

The sourcing partner your
procurement team has been looking for

01

Fully Certified Supply Chain

Every product ships with the documentation your market requires — FDA, CE, ISO 13485, or NMPA. We manage compliance so you don't have to navigate China's regulatory landscape alone.

02

Factory-Direct Pricing, Trading-Company Convenience

Direct manufacturer relationships mean pricing that supports real margins. One point of contact, one invoice, one shipment — without the complexity of managing an overseas supplier yourself.

03

Low MOQ — Start Small, Scale Smart

Most categories start at 10–50 pcs per item. Test sell-through with a mixed trial order before committing to volume. Standard 50/50 payment terms and 45-day lead time across the board.

04

Global Markets, Local Understanding

North America, Africa, Asia Pacific, Middle East, Europe — we understand the regulatory requirements and procurement culture of each market, and we speak your buyer's language.

Compliance & Certifications

Certified for the markets you serve

Every product we supply comes with full compliance documentation. No chasing, no delays — the paperwork your market requires is ready when you need it.

United States

FDA Registered

Registration No. 3017610906
Valid Through Dec 31, 2026
Scope Orthosis, Knee & Ankle Brace, Walker, Lumbar Support, Cervical, Hip & Joint Brace

Full documentation available upon request — verifiable at FDA.gov

Global Standard

ISO 13485:2016

Cert No. 117 25 Q0M 0183 R2S
Valid Through Nov 4, 2028
Scope Production & Export of Medical External Fixation Supports — full orthopedic range

Certified by ICAS — verifiable at CNCA-R-2003-117

European Union

CE Marked

Regulation EU MDR 2017/745
Classification Class I, Rule 1
Scope Orthopaedic Braces & Supports — full range including knee, ankle, back, shoulder

EU Authorised Representative: Humiss International B.V., Netherlands

NMPA Certified

China National Medical Products Administration — domestic manufacturing compliance

EN ISO Standards

Compliant with EN ISO 13485, 14971, 20417, 15223 and ISO 10993 series

Request Documentation

Full certificates and technical files provided to qualified buyers upon request

How It Works

From inquiry to delivery —
a straightforward process

Step 01

Send Your Inquiry

Tell us your product needs, target market, and approximate volume. We respond within one business day — no generic auto-replies.

Step 02

Receive Catalog & Quote

A tailored product selection with current pricing, certifications, and lead times — specific to your requirements, not a generic brochure.

Step 03

Sample & Evaluate

Request product samples before placing your first order. Low MOQ means testing is always accessible, not a privilege for large buyers only.

Step 04

Order & Scale

50% deposit to start production. We manage QC and logistics. Balance due on shipment. Scale your volume as confidence grows.

Ready to build your medical supply relationship with China?

Whether you're sourcing for the first time or switching suppliers — fill in the form and we'll respond within one business day with a tailored product catalog and pricing.
